title: Index thumb-cut tabs for reference books
sources: Douglas Cockerell, Bookbinding and the Care of Books (1901) — reference book structure
notes: Cutting and reinforcing thumb-cut notches in the foredge of a text block for sectioned indexing. Covers marking the notch positions across all sections uniformly, cutting with a scalpel in-register, and reinforcing the cut edge with a paper tape strip.
